title: Spooky Foods
description: Adds spooky snacks with creepy effects
body:
## **Spooky Foods:**
Spooky Foods is a Minecraft mod that introduces creepy food items with unique effects and surprises.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b29c78074936ed8ad795a94b024dc318be2282d_0.webp)

**Features:**

- Haunted Treats: Craft spooky snacks like the Fireball Lollipop, Creeper Cake and Sculk Steak.

- Effects: Each food item grants buffs and spooky side effects

- Themed Foods: Use materials from the Overworld, Nether, End, and Deep Dark to create your haunted meals.
### 
### Foods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Sculk Steak: Restores a lot of hunger and provides high saturation while granting the player a Regeneration effect. However, there's a 1% chance it will summon a Warden directly in front of the player if you're unlucky.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55b6b8ea9efaf2ef7762234e27e07645bf2871c5.png)


 

- Creeper Cake:  Explodes after consumption, dealing damage to nearby entities and blocks but not harming the player eating it. Be careful where you snack!


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc0c04ad62d7970f0ddb703779449981fd9e6d60.png)
 

- Fireball Lollipop: Grants Fire Resistance and Speed, but has a 20% chance to spawn a Blaze near the player.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a03855baf53d4d18866dc91ed9873b7f9fbce613.png)
 

- Slimy Honeycomb: Grants Jump Boost but also applies a Slowness debuff.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53bc2b238687c2d5746b7cca512f5d060c37249f.png)
 

- Ender Egg: Applies Night Vision to the player, with a 40% chance to spawn an Enderman and a 20% chance to spawn an Endermite.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/773fefda53ce35ef86bdd3e43b29c612ff9fd6ea.png)
 

- Rotten Apple: Inflicts Hunger and Nausea on the player but also grants a Resistance buff.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8df8b2c833760791eeb580526d575cd2f870a0a.png)
 

- Mud Bread: Grants the Haste effect but also inflicts Weakness, with a 10% chance to spawn a Silverfish upon consumption.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d684414bcf3a3aa3ab6b8c3427346811d9a6e1f6.png)
 

- Frozen Rotten Flesh: Freezes the player briefly but grants Resistance II


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73133ce32c23bc5b8bdf05d440ade523da5daf09.png)
 

- Magma Cookie: Sets the player on fire immediately upon consumption, but after a few seconds of burning, it grants Fire Resistance.

 
 ![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aef1fc21545cbb52017eca0e6d0dc527793c525c.png)

 

- Spider Eye Soup: Inflicts a brief Poison effect on the player but also grants Night Vision.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9ccc67ed9cfc29dccf94cf700c23fe6a5e6015.png)
 

- Phantom Ghast Drink: Grants Slow Falling and Regeneration to the player, but also inflicts Hunger and has a 20% chance to spawn a Phantom.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e07c908edae0e90491b03551516a358133aecfcd.png)
 

- Spoiled Chicken Bowl: Grants Strength and has a 10% chance to spawn a Chicken, but also inflicts Hunger and Poison for a short time.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40327924efa30f380a420335a79041faad4c78cd.png)
 

- Ashen Apple: Grants Fire Resistance but has a 30% chance to poison the player.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fcc782db1736ef51e85c1e6ee78589c2f979fc7.png)
 

- Skeleton Bone Broth: A nutritious meal but with a 20% chance to spawn a Skeleton near the player.


![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf523d92d2738ea708910646dbbc565951ad951.png)
 

Most recipes in this mod are shapeless, allowing ingredients to be placed in any arrangement



</details>
